rows.description: Lad - Lane Sparkes, Merton, pro Anno.
rows.notes: Amounts are consensus. Description 'Lad - Lane Sparkes, Merton, pro Anno.' from gemini-flash is visually more accurate regarding capitalization, spacing around hyphen, and spelling of 'Merton'. gpt-5-mini had 'Lad-lane Sparkes, Meriton'.
